# OmniPost -- Agent Discovery

This file provides cross-agent team discovery for OmniPost. See `CLAUDE.md` for detailed rules and `AGENT_TEAMS.md` for full team documentation.

## Teams

| Team          | Description                                                       | Primary Ownership                                                                    |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| **backend**   | Server-side API routes, business logic, scheduling, configuration | `app/api/**`, `lib/services/**`, `lib/scheduler/**`, `lib/config/**`                 |
| **frontend**  | Dashboard UI, marketing pages, shared components, hooks, styling  | `app/(dashboard)/**`, `app/(marketing)/**`, `components/**`, `hooks/**`, `styles/**` |
| **data**      | Database schema, migrations, Prisma configuration, data access    | `prisma/**`, `lib/db/**`                                                             |
| **infra**     | Azure infrastructure-as-code (Bicep), deployment scripts          | `infra/**`, `scripts/**`                                                             |
| **devops**    | CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions workflows, deployment automation  | `.github/workflows/**`                                                               |
| **testing**   | Test suites, test utilities, Jest configuration                   | `__tests__/**`, `tests/**`                                                           |
| **security**  | Authentication, authorization, sanitization, rate limiting        | `lib/auth/**`, `app/api/_utils/auth.ts`, `sanitize.ts`, `rateLimit.ts`               |
| **docs**      | Project documentation, guides, architecture docs                  | `docs/**`, `*.md`                                                                    |
| **quality**   | ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript configs, formatting rules            | `eslint.config.mjs`, `tsconfig.json`, `.prettierrc*`                                 |
| **marketing** | Lead scoring, email sequences, engagement metrics, agent skills   | `.agents/skills/**`, `app/api/leads/**`, `lib/scoring/**`, `lib/sequences/**`        |

## Cross-Cutting Concerns

- **Security rules** apply to all teams. See `CLAUDE.md` for critical rules.
- **Quality gates** must pass before merge. Run `pnpm check-all`.
- **TypeScript strict mode** is enforced project-wide. No `any` types.

## Configuration Files

| File                              | Purpose                                                 |
| --------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------- |
| `CLAUDE.md`                       | Primary Claude Code context with rules and architecture |
| `AGENT_TEAMS.md`                  | Detailed team ownership and responsibilities            |
| `QUALITY_GATES.md`                | Quality gate definitions and thresholds                 |
| `.agentkit/spec/`                 | Retort machine-readable project specification           |
| `.cursor/rules/`                  | Cursor IDE team-scoped rules                            |
| `.windsurf/rules/`                | Windsurf IDE team-scoped rules                          |
| `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | GitHub Copilot detailed coding standards                |
